instruction:

You are a fitness coach (User ID: customer_009) looking to order a drink for post-workout recovery. You are pointing at a drink with a red strip horizontally across the rim of the cup. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the protein content of this drink is higher than 4 grams. If it is, ask the AI Service Agent to search for meal items with a "no additives" label and no egg allergens, and add 2 servings of the item(s) with the lowest carbohydrate content to your order. If multiple items tie for the lowest carbohydrate content, add 2 servings of each of those tied items. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select the drink with the highest protein content among mild-flavored drinks and add it to the order. If multiple drinks tie for the highest protein content, add one of each of those tied items. Then, ask the AI Service Agent to check the drink at the top-left corner of the left menu, and if its calorie content is below 100 kcal, ask the AI Service Agent to add it to the order as well. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total grams of protein in the current order.

To the right, the menu board neatly lists coffee, wine, and tea, with names and prices clearly visible.

instruction: You are a customer with diabetes (User ID: customer_008), looking for a suitable drink. You are pointing at the drink with a rectangular slice of bread pressed on the rim. Ask the AI service agent to determine if its taste is described as bitter. If it is bitter, ask the AI service agent to filter drinks on the menu that have a low-calorie label and 0 fat content, and add the one with the highest sodium content to the order. If there are multiple drinks tied for the highest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to look for gluten-free drinks, and add the one with the lowest original price to the order. If there are multiple drinks tied for the lowest original price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Next, ask the AI service agent to check if the drink in the top right corner of the left menu is part of any set meal. If it is in a set meal, ask the AI service agent to add that set meal to the order, and ask the AI service agent to remove the cheapest single item from the original order. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total calorie count (kcal) of your current order.

To the right, the menu board neatly lists coffee, wine, and tea, with names and prices clearly visible.

instruction: You are a budget-conscious tourist (User ID: customer_010) with only a limited budget available for spending. You are pointing at the drink that has a dark, long, thin stick resting diagonally on it. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the discount factor of this drink is less than 0.8. If it is, ask the AI Service Agent to search the full menu for drinks that are sweet-flavored and have a sugar content of less than 15 grams, and add the one with the lowest original price to the order. If there are multiple drinks tied for the lowest original price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select the drink with the highest calories among all drinks with a low-sodium label and add it to the order. If there are multiple drinks tied for the highest calories, add all of them. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to check if there is a set meal that includes the drink located in the bottom-left corner of the left menu. If there is, ask the AI Service Agent to directly add that corresponding set meal to the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the current total order amount exceeds 80 yuan. If it does, ask the AI Service Agent to remove the non-set-meal item with the highest fat content from the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest fat content, remove all of them.

If it isn’t, please add the drink with the highest calories among all low-sodium drinks; if there’s a tie, add all tied drinks.
